title: European gas rises as Russian gas flows restart slowly
section_path: European gas rises as Russian gas flows restart slowly
section_path_text: European gas rises as Russian gas flows restart slowly
summary:
Main
By Daniel Hynes
Fears of weaker demand gripped commodity markets, pushing the metals and energy sectors lower. Slightly weaker USD and safe haven demand helped push the precious metals sector higher. Crude oil extended losses as concerns of weaker demand weighed on sentiment.
